findings.claim: The paper assumes that the chosen fairness metrics (SPD and EOD) adequately capture fairness in the context of the studied datasets.
findings.failure_mechanism: Other fairness metrics might provide a different perspective on fairness that is not captured by SPD and EOD alone.
findings.evidence_test: Comparing fairness outcomes using additional metrics such as demographic parity ratio or calibration.

critic_r1_output.summary: The proof-of-concept appears methodologically sound with no major flaws identified.

adjudicator_output.case_rationale: no advancing findings from critic R1
